items.title: Norwegian crown princess's son found guilty of two counts of rape
items.dek: Marius Borg Høiby, the 29-year-old son of Norway's Crown Princess Mette Marit, has been found guilty of two counts of rape and given four years in jail.
items.body: Marius Borg Høiby, the 29-year-old son of Norway's Crown Princess Mette Marit, has been found guilty of two counts of rape and given four years in jail.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Russian strikes kill nine and set historic cathedral in Kyiv ablaze
items.dek: A Ukrainian drone attack in the Russian city of Tula, south of Moscow, killed three people and wounded three others.
items.body: A Ukrainian drone attack in the Russian city of Tula, south of Moscow, killed three people and wounded three others.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Trump and thousands of others watch UFC fight on White House lawn
items.dek: Justin Gaethje beat Ilia Topuria to win the lightweight championship in the main event.
items.body: Justin Gaethje beat Ilia Topuria to win the lightweight championship in the main event.
items.author: IriLine Desk
